overall.description: Game engine footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person exploration of the Port of Los Santos industrial harbor. The player walks along a sidewalk next to a large ship in dry dock, briefly descends into a construction pit via metal stairs, and continues toward the waterfront under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor road approaching dry dock

events.description: green sedan passes by on the right side road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the harbor sidewalk toward the large ship in dry dock

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving past on the harbor road

entered.detail: massive cream and blue ship hull supported by red scaffolding in dry dock
large industrial yellow crane structure spanning across the dock
tall white industrial chimneys with red stripes emitting smoke
silver metal barrier separating sidewalk from road
multi-lane asphalt road with vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial harbor road under overcast skies. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing a metal guardrail, with a massive ship visible in dry dock ahead. A green sedan drives past on the right as the camera approaches the ship and yellow gantry cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal stairwell descending to dry dock floor

events.description: turns left and descends metal stairs into the concrete construction pit
ascends the stairs back to the main sidewalk level

agents.ego_description: descending metal stairs to explore the lower construction level, then climbing back up to sidewalk

entered.detail: metal staircase with railings leading down to dry dock floor
tall gray concrete wall with circular portholes
scattered concrete blocks and construction debris on the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and descends a metal stairwell into a narrow concrete construction pit. The view shows debris and concrete blocks at the bottom, with the ship hull visible above. After a brief look around, the camera ascends back to sidewalk level.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside ship in dry dock

events.description: passing the red scaffolding structure surrounding the ship hull

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the massive ship hull, observing the industrial scaffolding and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the harbor road parallel to the ship

entered.detail: red metal scaffolding framework surrounding the ship hull

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow corridor between the ship and the road, the camera passes the red scaffolding structure supporting the massive cream and blue hull. Vehicles occasionally pass on the right while yellow gantry cranes loom overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade past dry dock

events.description: passing the stern of the ship, view opens to the waterfront and distant mountains
approaching open water with billboard and industrial buildings visible across the harbor

agents.ego_description: continuing past the ship stern toward the open waterfront, passing under gantry crane legs

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with advertisements visible across the road
open water of the harbor visible beyond the dry dock
hazy mountains visible across the water in the background

segments.scene_description: Passing the stern of the ship, the scene opens up to a wide waterfront view. The camera walks under the massive legs of the yellow gantry cranes as the ship falls behind. A billboard and distant mountains become visible across the harbor water as the journey continues toward the open waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gray industrial harbor that transitions from a confined ship dock into an expansive waterfront vista. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk under overcast skies, passing a metal guardrail and a green sedan as a massive ship in dry dock looms ahead. The camera then turns to descend a metal stairwell into a narrow concrete construction pit filled with debris before ascending back to the surface to navigate the corridor between the road and the ship's cream and blue hull. As the camera passes the red scaffolding and the stern of the vessel, the scene opens up, moving beneath the towering legs of yellow gantry cranes. Finally, the industrial confinement gives way to a wide view of the harbor water, revealing a distant billboard and mountains on the horizon.
